response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C++ and Rust experience, as well as geospatial and navigation-related projects (e.g., GISCollective). However, his primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with less emphasis on low-latency, distributed systems, or routing data pipelines. His geospatial work is open-source and event-driven, which may not fully align with the commercial-scale routing tiling requirements. His adaptability and problem-solving approach are strong positives.
strengths: Proven experience with C++ and Rust (National Instruments, Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Strong background in geospatial data processing (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and solve complex problems
concerns: Limited direct experience with routing data pipelines or navigation systems at scale
Primary expertise in web/mobile development may not fully align with the role's focus on distributed systems and low-latency routing
No explicit mention of automating large-scale data processing or handling real-time traffic signals
